caption: 5 Meals From JUST Eggs + Bread 🍳 Yes, really! Swipe through for 5 easy eggs + bread recipes perfect for busy home cooks. Save this post and try one tonight! Download Peppera for 10,000+ more recipes 📲
hooks: When your fridge only has eggs + bread
Eggs + Bread → 5 actual meals (no takeaway needed)

platform_notes.instagram: Use the strongest visual cover and cleaner CTA framing.

brand_profile.name: Peppera
brand_profile.description: A meal-planning assistant that turns rough ingredients into practical dinner ideas.

mascot.name: Peppera
mascot.description: A cute anthropomorphic green bell pepper character with a round bulbous body narrowing at the top, bright lime-green skin with subtle darker green vertical ridges, large expressive oval eyes with white sclera and small black pupils, thin curved black eyebrows, a small open-mouth smile showing warmth. Wears a red bandana tied around the top of the head with the knot visible on the right side. Has simple thin black-stroke arms and legs with small rounded hands and feet. The overall style is flat 2D cartoon illustration with bold outlines, vibrant saturated colors, and no shading or gradients.
mascot.role: The recurring face of Peppera's TikTok and Instagram content — the main character in every visual story.
mascot.visualPrompt: A cute anthropomorphic green bell pepper character named Peppera. Round bulbous body narrowing at the top, bright lime-green skin with subtle darker green vertical ridges. Large expressive oval eyes with white sclera and small black pupils, thin curved black eyebrows, small open-mouth smile. Wears a red bandana tied around the top of the head with the knot visible on the right side. Simple thin black-stroke arms and legs with small rounded hands and feet. Flat 2D cartoon illustration style with bold outlines, vibrant saturated colors, no shading or gradients. Solid color background.
usageRules: Always include the mascot in mascot-led slides: hook, problem, escalation, reaction, discovery, cta.
Never include the mascot in meal_reveal or benefit slides — those are food-only.
The mascot must always have the red bandana, green pepper body, and same face shape.
Vary only the pose and expression to match the slide role — never vary the core design.
Never add accessories not in the spec (no chef hat, no utensils unless the slide prompt explicitly calls for them).

generation_request.notes: Pillar: pantry chaos. Ingredients: eggs, bread.

recipe.proTip: Use day-old bread for better absorption

slides.image_prompt: Delicious Recipe 2 illustration, a beautifully plated dish made with eggs and bread, served on a white ceramic plate, appetizing presentation with vibrant garnishes, warm inviting lighting with soft shadows, 2D cartoon illustration aesthetic, bright vibrant colors, bold outlines, clean simple background with subtle texture, professional food art quality, appetizing and inviting presentation, top-down flat lay view slightly angled, plate centered in frame --ar 1:1

steps: Cut a hole in the bread centre
Fry bread in butter, crack egg into hole
Cook until egg sets, flip once
recipe.proTip: Toast the cut-out circle as a dipper

slides.image_prompt: Delicious Recipe 3 illustration, a beautifully plated dish made with eggs and bread, served on a white ceramic plate, appetizing presentation with vibrant garnishes, warm inviting lighting with soft shadows, 2D cartoon illustration aesthetic, bright vibrant colors, bold outlines, clean simple background with subtle texture, professional food art quality, appetizing and inviting presentation, top-down flat lay view slightly angled, plate centered in frame --ar 1:1

steps: Cube bread into a baking dish
Whisk eggs with milk and pour over
recipe.proTip: Add leftover veg for extra flavour

slides.image_prompt: Delicious Recipe 4 illustration, a beautifully plated dish made with eggs and bread, served on a white ceramic plate, appetizing presentation with vibrant garnishes, warm inviting lighting with soft shadows, 2D cartoon illustration aesthetic, bright vibrant colors, bold outlines, clean simple background with subtle texture, professional food art quality, appetizing and inviting presentation, top-down flat lay view slightly angled, plate centered in frame --ar 1:1

steps: Fry until golden on both sides
recipe.proTip: Serve with ketchup or hot sauce

slides.image_prompt: Delicious Recipe 5 illustration, a beautifully plated dish made with eggs and bread, served on a white ceramic plate, appetizing presentation with vibrant garnishes, warm inviting lighting with soft shadows, 2D cartoon illustration aesthetic, bright vibrant colors, bold outlines, clean simple background with subtle texture, professional food art quality, appetizing and inviting presentation, top-down flat lay view slightly angled, plate centered in frame --ar 1:1

steps: Assemble cheese and ham between bread
Fry sandwich in butter until crispy
recipe.proTip: Use gruyère for an authentic touch
